subject: [PATCH 07/11] mm/zsmalloc, zswap: Handle objcg charging and lifetime in zsmalloc

reviews.author: Johannes Weiner
reviews.summary: Raised concern about the clarity of code, specifically the use of obj_cgroup_get() for the pointer, not the charge. Suggested reordering the obj_cgroup_get() calls to make it clearer.

2026-03-12.patch_summary: The patch handles objcg charging and lifetime in zsmalloc, but a reviewer pointed out that the obj_cgroup_get() reference is for the pointer, not the charge.
